desires: To maintain the warm, guilt-free feeling of having prioritized Mina's connection over the review, ensuring that choice remains my primary identity.
To avoid any future scenario where I feel torn between a friend and an academic task, seeking to make their needs permanently outweigh my work.

This aligns with my avoidance of conflict and my desire to make relationships outweigh academic pressure permanently.
